questions.question: Why don't Vue 3 Composition API composables use 'this', unlike the Options API?
options: Arrow functions don't have their own 'this', and Composition API uses closures instead
TypeScript requires avoiding 'this' for proper type inference
The Proxy-based reactivity system is incompatible with 'this' binding

questions.question: Which JavaScript concept is Vue 3's reactivity system built on for intercepting property access?
options: WeakMap for storing dependency tracking data
Proxy to intercept get and set operations

questions.question: Which JavaScript concept does NOT need to be learned before starting with Vue 3?
